Class MediaSortTask

java.lang.Object
java.util.concurrent.FutureTask<Path>
javafx.concurrent.Task<Path>
fun.seabird.sorter.MediaSortTask
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Future<Path>, RunnableFuture<Path>, javafx.concurrent.Worker<Path>, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class MediaSortTask extends javafx.concurrent.Task<Path>

  • Constructor Details

    • MediaSortTask

      public MediaSortTask()

  • Method Details

    • currentProcess

      public Process currentProcess()

    • destroyCurrentProcess

      public void destroyCurrentProcess()
      Gracefully shuts down the current FFmpeg Process if it is running.

      Sends a quit command to FFmpeg, then forcefully terminates the process tree using ProcessHandle as a fallback.

    • call

      protected Path call() throws Exception
      Executes the main logic of the media processing task. This method is called when the task is executed.
      Specified by:
      call in class javafx.concurrent.Task<Path>
      Returns:
      The path to the generated index file, or null if no eligible media files are found.
      Throws:
      Exception - If an error occurs during the execution of the task.
